payload.answer: Admin SQL select-only mode permits `SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10` and denies `DELETE FROM memory_cards`.
citations: Input: "Admin SQL select-only mode: SELECT id FROM memory_cards LIMIT 10 allowed; DELETE FROM memory_cards denied."
payload.decision: SELECT is allowed; DELETE is denied in select-only mode.
